e2e.reason: no web surface; the behavior surface is the iterate-setup CLI (see surface_verification)

surface_verification.justification: The behavior surface of this fix is the iterate-setup CLI. The runner drives the real setup_iterate_worktree.py against a real git repo seeded with the exact shipwright-webui failure shape, then asks the operator's question through the board's own reader (triage.read_all_items). A unit pin over decide() would not catch the sweep still eating the dismiss at the entry point.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — a status whose append is known only from main's tracked log is not an orphan and is never a quarantine candidate
behaviors.evidence: test_status_whose_append_is_only_in_main_tracked_is_not_an_orphan + test_the_old_universe_is_what_ate_the_dismiss (the pre-fix universe quarantines the same dismiss)

behaviors.behavior: AC2 — a protected-but-unplaceable status fails CLOSED (invalid) instead of being quarantined, with an actionable reason
behaviors.evidence: test_an_unplaceable_known_append_blocks_instead_of_eating_the_dismiss (sweep returns invalid; dismiss stays in the outbox; quarantine log empty)

behaviors.behavior: AC3 — append-only drift in main's tracked log is routed into the outbox and rides the branch; main's log is restored to HEAD
AC4 — refusal guards mutate nothing: diverged / reordered / deleted-HEAD-line / whitespace-only edit / emptied / deleted / staged index / malformed drift
behaviors.evidence: test_sweep_drift_guards.py (8 refusal tests, each asserting the tracked log and outbox are byte-unchanged)

behaviors.behavior: AC4b — a state that is understood but unrepairable (no HEAD blob; headerless blob) does NOT block delivery of the outbox
AC5 — quarantine + adoption counts reach the operator (stderr + warnings[])
behaviors.evidence: test_sweep_warnings_surface_quarantine_and_adoption + the surface runner asserts the QUARANTINED warning in setup's warnings[]

behaviors.behavior: AC6 — the webui shape end-to-end: the operator's only dismiss survives and the reader resolves the item to dismissed
The restore preserves the log's real EOL: neither a CRLF checkout nor a CRLF drift line over an LF checkout reflows the file
A block mutates nothing — the drift never leaves the git-tracked log for the gitignored buffer on an aborting sweep
Crash-replay is idempotent: an interrupted adoption re-plans and never double-buffers the drift
A race during the restore reports 'buffered' with the true adopted count, not a silent 'adopted' with 0
A genuine orphan (append nowhere at all) is still quarantined — the #303 behavior is preserved
